fields.name: Buy-from Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Pay-to Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor that you received the invoice from.

fields.name: Pay-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer who you received the invoice from.

fields.name: Pay-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the vendor who you receive or received the credit memo from.

fields.name: Pay-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the vendor that you received the invoice from.

fields.name: Pay-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the address of the customer that the invoice was shipped to.

fields.name: Pay-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer that you shipped the invoice to.

fields.name: Pay-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person to contact about an invoice from this customer.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the vendor's reference.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Your Reference field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the company at the address to which the items in the purchase return order were shipped.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the ship-to address, in case it is a long address.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry's posting date.

fields.name: Expected Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which you expect to send the items back to the vendor.

fields.name: Posting Description
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type, such as Return Shipment, and the number of the entry.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Posting Description field in the Purchase Header table.
The posting description also appears on vendor and G/L entries.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Payment Terms Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the payment terms that apply to the purchase header.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Payment Terms Code field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date that the original invoice must be paid. The program calculates the date using the Payment Terms Code and Posting Date fields on the purchase header.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Payment Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the payment discount percentage that will be granted if you pay for the original purchase on or before the date in the Pmt. Discount Date field.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Payment Discount % field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Pmt. Discount Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the last date on which you can pay the original invoice and still receive a payment discount.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Pmt. Discount Date field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the shipment method for this return shipment.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Shipment Method Code field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location from where inventory items to the customer on the sales document are to be shipped by default.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Vendor Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the vendor posting group that was used when the return shipment was posted.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Vendor Posting Group field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency that is used on the entry.

fields.name: Currency Factor
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Invoice Disc. Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the invoice discount that was granted on the invoice that the credit memo was created from that resulted in the return shipment.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Invoice Disc. Code field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the language used on the posted return shipment.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Language Code field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Purchaser Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which purchaser is assigned to the vendor.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether there is a comment for this return shipment.
To view a comment or create a new one, click Related Information, point to Return, and then click Comments, and the Purch. Comment Line window appears. You can see the existing comments and create new ones.
You can also enter a comment in the Notes FactBox.

fields.name: No. Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times the document has been printed.

fields.name: On Hold
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the return shipment will be included in the payment journal.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the posted document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the posted document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the general ledger account or bank account to which a balancing entry for the return shipment was posted.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Bal. Account No. field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the vendor's VAT registration number.
The program copies the contents of this field from the VAT Registration No. field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of your customer that your vendor has shipped the items to directly. This field is used only when the return shipment line is for a drop shipment.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Sell-to Customer No. field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the reason code that is associated with the return shipment.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Reason Code field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the general business posting group code that is assigned to the vendor that you shipped the returned items to.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction type specified in the original purchase header.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Transaction Type field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transport method specified in the original purchase header.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Transport Method field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip:
Shows the vendor's VAT country/region code.
The program copies the contents of this field from the VAT Country/Region Code field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Buy-from Vendor Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Buy-from Vendor Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the vendor that you’re buying from.

fields.name: Buy-from Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Buy-from Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the address of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Buy-from City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Buy-from Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Pay-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the post code of the customer that you received the invoice from.

fields.name: Pay-to County
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the county of the vendor that payment was made to.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Pay-to County field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Pay-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address.

fields.name: Buy-from Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the post code of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Buy-from County
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the county of the address of the vendor that you bought the returned items from.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Buy-from County field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Buy-from Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to County
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the county of the address that you shipped the returned items to.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Ship-to County field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Ship-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the balancing account type used in the return shipment.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Bal. Account Type field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Order Address Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order address of the related customer.

fields.name: Entry Point
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code of the port of entry where the items pass into your country/region.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Entry Point field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether this return shipment was posted as a corrective entry.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Correction field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the area code used for the return shipment.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Area field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the transaction specification that was used in the return shipment.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Transaction Specification field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Payment Method Code
fields.tooltip:
Describes the code for the payment method used for payments to this vendor.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Payment Method Code field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the posted return shipment.
The program automatically copies the contents of this field from the Return Shipment No. Series field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the ID of the user who posted the return shipment.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has been posted.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the source code that is linked to the return shipment header.
The program copies the contents of this field from either the Purchases field or the Deleted Document field in the Source Code Setup table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the tax area code of the vendor.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Tax Area Code field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that purchases from the vendor on the purchase header are liable to sales tax.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Tax Liable field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT business posting group of the vendor.
The program copies the contents of this field from the VAT Bus. Posting Group field in the Purchase Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Base Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the percentage to use to discount the VAT element if a payment discount is to be posted. The value is checked against the maximum possible value in the VAT Tolerance % field in the General Ledger Setup table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number of the company's shipping address.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Campaign No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the campaign that the document is linked to.

fields.name: Buy-from Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact person at the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Pay-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the person to contact about an invoice from this customer.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the responsibility center, such as a distribution hub, that is associated with the involved user, company, customer, or vendor.

fields.name: Vendor Authorization No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the identification number of a compensation agreement.

fields.name: Return Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the return order that will post a return shipment.

fields.name: Return Order No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series that was used to assign a number to the purchase return order that the return shipment is related to.
